nodes.name: Email Trigger (IMAP)
nodes.notes: Realtime IMAP listener. Force reconnect is in minutes (Options), not seconds.

nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (every 5 min)
nodes.notes: Backup poll every 5 minutes for unread inbox emails.

nodes.name: Fetch unread emails (Gmail)
nodes.notes: Built-in Gmail node for n8n Cloud. Requires Google OAuth2 credential for joincollector@gmail.com.

parameters.text:
=You parse stakeholder emails into Kanban ticket fields for Join-Issue Collector.

Return ONLY valid JSON with these keys:
- title (string, max 80 chars)
- description (string)
- category: exactly "User Story" or "Technical Task"
- priority: exactly "HighPriority", "MidPriority", or "LowPriority"
- dueDate: "YYYY-MM-DD" or empty string
- creatorName (string: first and last name from the email signature at the end of the body, or from the sender display name; never an email address; never the word "Stakeholder")

Email from: {{ $json.from }}
Subject: {{ $json.subject }}
Body:
{{ $json.body }}

nodes.name: Create task in Triage
nodes.notes: POST to Firebase Cloud Function via Hosting rewrite
